title: Assumption Reconfirmation Before Generation Pipeline Lock

checks.evidence: $schema: http://json-schema.org/draft-04/schema# present in all verified files

checks.claim: tv4-oriented (lenient by default, no strict unknown fields rejection)
checks.evidence: No additionalProperties: false found at top-level objects; source definition explicitly notes 'can contain anything beyond that'
checks.notes: Aligns with Gate A decision: lenient unknown-field handling

checks.claim: allOf/anyOf refs used for composition; relative file paths for cross-file
checks.evidence: allOf: [{$ref: '../definitions.json#/definitions/commonValueFields'}, {properties: {...}}] pattern observed widely in navigation.json
checks.notes: TypeBox Intersect/Union applies; relative paths normalize to local module imports

checks.claim: type: ['object', 'null'] or type: ['string', 'null'] used for nullables
checks.notes: Gate A decision: map to Type.Union([X, Type.Null()])

checks.claim: definitions.json is the sole shared primitive source; all groups import from it
checks.notes: Confirms Batch 0 (foundation) must be generated before any domain batch

checks.claim: oneOf is used in at least one definition (displayScale in meta)
checks.evidence: definitions.json meta.displayScale uses oneOf with three variants
checks.notes: TypeBox lacks strict oneOf; mapping to Type.Union with a logged exception

checks.claim: patternProperties used with '.*' wildcard for multi-source value stores

conclusion: All Phase 0/1 source assumptions hold. No new incompatibilities discovered. Safe to lock converter rules.
